query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM admin_notifications; SELECT COUNT(*) as test_count FROM admin_notifications WHERE title = 'Test Notification'; SELECT COUNT(*) as non_test FROM admin_notifications WHERE title != 'Test Notification';
